args.code: (() => { const s = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1') || '{}'); const fields = s.fields || []; const cropInfo = fields.map(f => f.crop ? `${f.crop}(${f.stage})` : '空闲').join('+'); const skillLv = Object.values(s.skills || {}).reduce((a,b)=>a+(b.level||0),0); const npcCount = Object.keys(s.npcs || {}).length; const petNames = Object.keys(s.pets || {}).join('+') || '无'; const highestFriend = Object.entries(s.friendship || {}).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1])[0]; const highestNpc = highestFriend ? `${highestFriend[0]}${highestFriend[1]}` : '无'; const completedQuests = Object.values(s.quests || {}).filter(v=>v===true).length; const totalQuests = Object.keys(s.quests || {}).length; const milestones = Object.keys(s.npcMilestones || {}).length; const weather = s.currentWeather ? `${s.currentWeather.type}(剩${s.currentWeather.daysLeft||0}天)` : '-'; const eventHistory = s.eventHistory ? s.eventHistory.length : (s.events ? s.events.length : 0); return JSON.stringify({day:s.day, season:s.season, weather:weather, money:s.money, stamina:`${s.stamina}/${s.maxStamina}`, health:`${s.health}/${s.maxHealth}`, fieldCount:fields.length, crops:cropInfo||'无', eventCount:eventHistory, skillTotal:skillLv, highestNpc:highestNpc, reputation:s.reputation, mood:s.mood, mode:s.mode, house:s.house, research:s.researchPoints, storage:s.storageCapacity, pets:petNames, npcCount:npcCount, quests:`${completedQuests}/${totalQuests}`, milestones:milestones, disasterRate:s.disasterRate, version:s.saveVersion, time:s.time, daysPlayed:s.daysPlayed}); })()
